_comment: Single source of truth for accessibility test URLs. Read by .pa11yci.cjs, ../tests/wcag-audit.spec.js, and ../scripts/a11y-audit.sh. This is a single-page static site, so the homepage is the only route. 'pr' and 'full' are identical here; both keys are kept so the scope plumbing matches the standard harness. Interactive states (mobile menu, coach bios, live calendar) are covered by expanding all <details> in the Playwright spec rather than by separate URLs.
